questions: amar info ki safe ache apnader kache?
answers: ISP Digital er network enterprise-grade firewall diye protected. Apnar connection e built-in DDoS protection, malware filtering, ar intrusion detection system ache. Apnar security amader priority!

Parental control set korte ISP Digital app e 'Family Safety' feature use korun. Specific website block korte paren, screen time limit set korte paren, ar age-appropriate content filter enable korte paren.
VPN service ISP Digital directly provide kore na, tobe amra recommend kori trusted VPN (NordVPN, ExpressVPN) use korte. Amader connection e VPN use e kono restriction nai!
Account hack mone hole immediately password change korun ar amader helpline e call korun. ISP Digital er security team apnar account secure korbe ar unauthorized access block korbe.
Strong password er tips: minimum 12 characters, uppercase + lowercase + numbers + symbols mix korun. 'password123' type password use korben na! ISP Digital er account e 2FA enable korun.

ISP Digital er data privacy policy onek strict — apnar personal information ba browsing data kono third party er shathe share kora hoy na. BDPA (Bangladesh Data Protection Act) fully comply kori amra.
Two-factor authentication (2FA) ISP Digital er account e available! Settings > Security > 2FA enable korun. SMS ba authenticator app diye extra security layer add korun.
Phishing attack mane fake email/website diye apnar info churir cheshta. ISP Digital konodin email e password ba OTP jigges korbe na! Suspicious email paile ignore korun ar amader report korun.
Child safe internet er jonno ISP Digital er 'Safe Internet' add-on service ache masik 100 taka te. Adult content automatic block hoy, safe search enforced thake, ar browsing report paben!

Online scam theke bachte: 1) Unknown link e click korben na, 2) OTP karo shathe share korben na, 3) Too good to be true offer e bisshash korben na. ISP Digital regularly security awareness tips share kore!
